content.full_text:
January 28, 2008

Renee Phillips
Staff Accountant
Jelly Belly Candy Company
1 Jelly Belly Lane
Fairfield, CA 94533

Re: Your Request for Advice
    Our File No. W-08-008

Dear Ms. Phillips:

This letter is to notify you that we have withdrawn the above captioned request for advice per our telephone conversation on January 24, 2008.

If you have any questions, feel free to call me at (916) 322-5660.

Sincerely,

Scott Hallabrin
General Counsel

By: Trish Mayer
Political Reform Consultant
